issues.title: Refactor VectoStore's usage on Document.getEmbedding
issues.body:
As a result of deprecating `embedding` from the `Document` object, refer: https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-ai/issues/1781, some of the vector store operations, specifically the `doSimilaritySearch` method relies on `Document#getEmbedding`. 

This issue addresses the refactoring of this dependency.
